name: Long-Form Copy
description: Writes extended, persuasive copy for landing pages, articles, whitepapers, and brand content that builds trust, communicates value, and drives conversions.

variables.name: format
variables.description: Format: landing page, article, case study, whitepaper, pillar page

variables.name: goal
variables.description: Goal: conversion, engagement, education, lead generation

variables.name: product_service
variables.description: Product, service, or brand being promoted

variables.name: audience
variables.description: Target audience and their knowledge level

variables.name: key_points
variables.description: Key messages, benefits, or points to cover
